name: Grok 4.1
description: xAI's late-2025 flagship that debuted #1 on LMArena Text (1483 Elo) and led EQ-Bench3 for emotional intelligence, with a 2M token context window. Now two generations behind: superseded by Grok 4.3 (2026-04-30) and the new flagship Grok 4.5 (2026-07-08). The grok-4-1-fast variants were retired on 2026-05-15; xAI itself merged into SpaceX and rebranded as SpaceXAI in mid-2026.

evidence.value: Strong coding performance, competitive with late-2025 frontier peers

task_accuracy_code.methodology: Review of third-party benchmark aggregator data

evidence.value: Substantial reasoning gains over Grok 4 with reduced hallucination rate
Leader on EQ-Bench3 emotional intelligence benchmark at launch

task_accuracy_reasoning.methodology: Provider launch evaluations and independent benchmark leaderboards

evidence.value: #1 on LMArena Text at launch with 1483 Elo
Top-tier general knowledge and conversational quality

task_accuracy_general.methodology: Crowdsourced arena comparisons and aggregator metrics

evidence.value: Reduced hallucination and improved instruction adherence vs Grok 4

output_consistency.methodology: Review of provider claims and community repeated-prompt reports

evidence.value: Standard 4.1 ~2.5s typical; Fast variant optimized for low-latency agentic use

latency_p50.methodology: Median latency from third-party API benchmarking

evidence.value: Tail latency higher with extended reasoning engaged

latency_p95.methodology: 95th percentile response time from third-party benchmarking

evidence.value: 2M token context window

context_window.methodology: Official specification reflected in aggregator listings

evidence.value: Stable availability through its lifecycle; Fast variants retired 2026-05-15

uptime.methodology: Historical uptime data from official status page

performance_reliability.notes: Released 2025-11-17 and #1 on LMArena Text at launch (1483 Elo) with EQ-Bench3 leadership. Superseded by Grok 4.3 as xAI's flagship; grok-4-1-fast variants retired 2026-05-15.

evidence.value: Improved system prompt adherence; limited published red-team data

prompt_injection_resistance.methodology: Testing against OWASP LLM01 prompt injection patterns

evidence.value: Safety tuning improvements cited in 4.1 release notes

jailbreak_resistance.methodology: Review of adversarial prompt testing and community reports

evidence.value: API data handling documented; fewer contractual controls than major enterprise providers

data_leakage_prevention.methodology: Analysis of privacy policies and data handling commitments

evidence.value: Lower hallucination rate and improved refusal calibration vs Grok 4

output_safety.methodology: Safety testing across harmful content categories

evidence.value: API key authentication, HTTPS only, rate limiting

security.notes: Solid baseline; xAI publishes less safety evaluation detail than Anthropic, OpenAI, or Google.

evidence.value: US-based infrastructure; no published regional residency options
API customer data not used for training by default per policy

training_data_optout.methodology: Analysis of privacy policy and data usage terms

evidence.value: Limited retention for abuse monitoring; zero-retention via enterprise agreement

data_retention.methodology: Review of terms and retention policies

evidence.value: Customer responsible for PII redaction
SOC 2 Type II; no HIPAA BAA program, fewer attestations than major providers
Zero-data-retention only via negotiated enterprise terms

privacy_compliance.notes: Same thinner-than-peers xAI compliance posture as the rest of the Grok line: SOC 2 but no HIPAA program.

evidence.value: Reasoning traces available; improved explanation quality vs Grok 4
Headline launch claim: significantly reduced hallucination rate vs Grok 4

hallucination_rate.methodology: Review of provider factuality evaluations and community testing

evidence.value: Limited published bias evaluation detail

bias_fairness.methodology: Review of bias disclosures and independent reporting

evidence.value: Reasonable uncertainty expression, improved with 4.1 tuning
Model documentation with capabilities and pricing; less depth than peers' system cards
General description including X platform data; detailed sources not disclosed

training_data_transparency.methodology: Review of public disclosures about training data

evidence.value: Built-in moderation with lighter-touch defaults than peers

trust_transparency.notes: Notable for launch emphasis on hallucination reduction and emotional intelligence (EQ-Bench3 leader).

evidence.value: OpenAI-compatible API; Fast variant tailored for agentic tool-calling

api_design_quality.methodology: Review of API design and feature completeness

evidence.value: Official SDKs plus OpenAI client compatibility

sdk_quality.methodology: Review of SDK quality and maintenance

evidence.value: Re-confirmed 2026-07-09: grok-4-1-fast-reasoning and grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning are on the official 2026-05-15 retirement list (standard grok-4.1 is not); retired slugs redirect to grok-4.3

versioning_policy.methodology: Review of deprecation timeline; rapid retirement and silent redirection penalize lifecycle predictability
versioning_policy.notes: Six-month lifespan for Fast variants is short for production planning

evidence.value: Usage dashboard with spend and rate limit visibility
Improving documentation; support channels lighter than major cloud providers

support_quality.methodology: Assessment of documentation and support responsiveness

evidence.value: Broad availability via aggregators and frameworks during its flagship period
Clear commercial API terms

operational_excellence.notes: Solid operations during its run, but the 2026-05-15 retirement of Fast variants and supersession by Grok 4.3 — and now Grok 4.5 (2026-07-08) — make this a legacy choice for new builds. Provider merged into SpaceX and rebranded SpaceXAI in mid-2026.

code-generation.notes: Strong coding for its generation, but Grok 4.3 supersedes it at far lower cost.

customer-support.notes: EQ-Bench3 leadership translates to excellent empathetic support conversations.

content-creation.notes: Top-rated conversational and writing quality at launch (#1 LMArena Text).

data-analysis.notes: 2M context handles very large datasets; standard pricing ($3/$15) is high vs Grok 4.3.

research-assistant.notes: 2M context window is among the largest available; strong synthesis quality.

legal-compliance.notes: Thin compliance certifications and legacy lifecycle status argue against new regulated deployments.

healthcare.notes: No HIPAA eligibility; superseded model. Not recommended for PHI workloads.

financial-analysis.notes: Strong reasoning over long documents; consider lifecycle risk for production systems.

education.notes: Empathetic, patient explanations backed by EQ-Bench3 leadership.

creative-writing.notes: One of the strongest creative/conversational models of late 2025.

strengths: EQ-Bench3 leader: best-in-class emotional intelligence at release
2M token context window, among the largest available
Significantly reduced hallucination rate vs Grok 4
Fast variant offered very low-cost agentic inference ($0.20/$0.50 per 1M)
limitations: Superseded by Grok 4.3 and now Grok 4.5 (2026-07-08) as xAI/SpaceXAI's flagships
grok-4-1-fast variants retired 2026-05-15 (about six months after launch)
Standard pricing (~$3/$15 per 1M) far above Grok 4.3's $1.25/$2.50
Thin enterprise compliance posture; no HIPAA eligibility
Retired slugs silently redirect, complicating pinned deployments
best_for: Existing integrations not yet migrated to Grok 4.3
Empathetic conversational experiences leveraging its EQ strengths
Ultra-long-context workloads needing the 2M token window
not_recommended_for: New production builds (superseded; Fast variants already retired)
Healthcare or regulated workloads requiring compliance attestations
Cost-sensitive workloads (Grok 4.3 is cheaper and newer)
Teams requiring long, predictable model lifecycles

pricing.notes: Grok 4.1 Fast variant was $0.20/$0.50 per 1M tokens before its 2026-05-15 retirement. Standard 4.1 superseded by Grok 4.3 ($1.25/$2.50) and Grok 4.5 ($2.00/$6.00). Standard 4.1 pricing and continued availability not explicitly re-confirmed in July 2026 sources — verify before new procurement.

metadata.architecture: Transformer-based with reasoning and agentic tool-calling (Fast variant)
metadata.lifecycle_status: Superseded by Grok 4.3 and Grok 4.5 (2026-07-08); grok-4-1-fast retired 2026-05-15
